summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QC Auto Compare Phase 2 features. All major functionality working correctly including dynamic filters, URL synchronization, reconciliation endpoint, and UI features.
passed_tests: BUG #3: GET /api/filters/options returns dynamic filter values from database
BUG #3: FilterBar dropdown options populated from API (6 makes, 2 conditions)
BUG #7: POST /api/crawl/reconcile endpoint exists and validates dealer input
BUG #7: Only active vehicles appear in search results (10/10 vehicles active)
AMÉLIORATION #4: URL updates correctly when filters change (?make=Toyota&condition=new)
AMÉLIORATION #4: Filter reset clears URL parameters properly
AMÉLIORATION #4: Browser navigation preserves filter state
View mode toggle between table and cards view working
Source pill filtering working (crawler: 4 vehicles filtered correctly)
All backend APIs responding with 200 status codes
Vehicle listing, filtering, and pagination working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI features and integrations working correctly
